01 / About

Detail-oriented, dashboard-obsessed.

I'm a detail-oriented, analytically driven fresher Data Analyst with hands-on project experience in Power BI, SQL, and Python.

I'm skilled at transforming raw, messy data into clear dashboards and actionable insights — through data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and visualization. I have a strong foundation in statistics and database querying, with a keen eye for spotting trends that actually support a decision.

02 / Projects

Dashboards & queries that answer real questions.

Power BI

Zomato Restaurant Analytics Dashboard

A 4-page interactive dashboard analyzing 9,536 restaurants across 140 cities and 1M+ votes. Surfaced that only 25.69% of restaurants offer online delivery, found a major rating-quality gap (3% "Excellent" vs. 39% "Average"), and delivered 5 data-driven recommendations for executive decision-making.

Power BIDAXData Cleaning
View on GitHub
Power BI · Pandas · NumPy

Superstore Sales Dashboard

Analyzed 2 years of retail data — ₹1.6M in sales, 22K units, ₹175K profit — using Pandas and NumPy. Built an interactive dashboard with region/category/time filters, plus a 15-day sales forecast model to support demand planning across 4 regions and 3 categories.

Power BIPandasNumPyForecasting
View on GitHub
1-- Top 10 rock artists by track count
2SELECT ar.name, COUNT(t.track_id)
3FROM artists ar
4JOIN albums al ON ...
5JOIN tracks t ON ...
6GROUP BY ar.name
7ORDER BY COUNT(t.track_id) DESC
8LIMIT 10;
9-- → Led Zeppelin, 114 tracks
SQL · PostgreSQL · pgAdmin

Digital Music Store Database Analysis

Queried an 11-table relational database using joins, subqueries, and aggregations to answer real business questions. Used a nested subquery across 4 tables to extract 59 Rock listeners, ranked top artists (Led Zeppelin, 114 tracks), and applied window functions for revenue and customer analysis.

SQLJoinsSubqueriesAggregations
